hooks.command: echo 'PostToolUse (coord edit guard per AGENTS.md + .githooks/agentic-hook-runner.ts tie): running pnpm agent:alignment && pnpm docs:drift-check'; pnpm agent:alignment && pnpm docs:drift-check || echo 'Guard check completed with notes (exit non-zero ignored for PostToolUse; review output)'; echo 'OpenClaw tie: .githooks pre-commit/pre-push also run the agentic-hook-runner.ts (drift/alignment/architecture/post-slice) on git ops for these files.'
echo 'PostToolUse Bash: consider affected package test or runner if coord change (see tools/openclinxr/openclaw/agentic-hook-runner.ts --profile local-exam or pre-commit)'

echo 'PreCompact reminder (per AGENTS.md Required Resume Sequence + LOW_TOKEN): immediately re-read ONLY the Current State Snapshot blocks (first ~20-80 lines) of PROJECT_COORDINATION_INDEX.md, AUTONOMOUS_WORK_PLAN.md, docs/openclinxr/worker-backlog-and-validation-matrix.md + AGENTS.md top. Use snapshots + targeted rg/read_file(limit) + lease status. Do not narrate; continue with next approved slice.'

echo 'SessionStart for openclinxr (AgenticEx): follow Required Resume Sequence in AGENTS.md exactly (re-read 4 files snapshots first). Project hooks active (PostToolUse auto-guards on edits to coord files; PreCompact rehydrate). Lease before edits. After coord changes always pnpm agent:alignment && pnpm docs:drift-check. See agents/rules/ for modular policies.'
